content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.59%, Bank Nifty -0.83%, India VIX +3.25% to 17.16 - market in mild risk-off mode despite IT/Pharma showing relative strength. Book is +1.50% today with strong winners (PNBHOUSING +9.9%, COFORGE +6.2%, HAL +4.7%, CAMS +3.9%) - priority is locking in gains via SL trailing rather than chasing breakouts at extended levels. Deployment 58% with 11 active CNC positions plus stale HFCL MIS order from yesterday to clean up.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1060.65,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +9.9%, CMP 1081.60. Current SL 1060.65 already locks in ~7.8% gain (well above entry 984). 1% trail-gap discipline: SL must sit ≥1% below CMP, so floor is 1070.78 - keeping SL at 1060.65 (1.94% below CMP) gives normal noise room. Raising target to 1130 reflects strong Q4 (PAT +19.2%, GNPA 0.93% best-in-class) and momentum toward 52w high 1141.90. R:R from here favorable. No-op MODIFY check: target IS changing (1110→1130), so this MODIFY is justified."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold ETF -0.7%, well above SL 121.00 (current 124.18 = ~2.6% buffer). Gold consolidating but structural bid intact (CB buying, INR weakness). Hold as portfolio hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "new_target": 5050.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +4.7% at 4791. Current SL 4725.56 sits 1.37% below CMP - within 1% trail-gap floor (1% floor = 4743.09; SL 4725.56 is ~1.36% below, OK). Q4 board meeting May 14 is binary event in 4 sessions (just outside the 3-session rule but worth tightening target visibility). Raising target to 5050 (52w high 5165 within reach). Will re-evaluate before May 14 for event-trade discipline (Rule 11) - if still held into May 13, will trim or tighten SL further. New target only change today."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 6960.00,
      "new_target": 7400.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.8% at 7023. SL 6960 sits 0.9% below CMP - this is BELOW the 1% trail-gap floor. Need to either widen SL or recognize self-stopout risk. Reading current SL: stored is 6960. Cannot loosen SL (rule), so HOLD-equivalent: keeping SL at 6960, target at 7400. No change needed. Switching to HOLD instead - this is no-op MODIFY territory."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.3% at 840.70, SL 836 just 0.6% below CMP - ALREADY inside 1% trail-gap floor (self-stopout risk on normal noise). Cannot loosen SL per rule. Q4 board meeting expected May 2026 (date TBA) creates binary risk if it falls within 3 sessions. Hold for now, monitor; if SL fires it fires - the entry SL was sized to absorb noise. Promoter warrant + Naval Systems Falta approval + Jefferies Buy = thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.8% at 366.20, SL 365 just 0.3% below CMP - extreme pre-SL territory. Cannot loosen. Q4 strong (PAT +30.6%, lending Rs 2.07 lakh cr). Per Rule 17, normal intraday noise will likely trip SL but that's the calibrated max loss; respect it. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.5% at 831.95, SL 820 (= entry, breakeven). SL sits 1.44% below CMP - within trail-gap discipline. Strong Q4 (rev +22%, India vol +9%, intl +19%). At record high. Holding SL at breakeven (free option). No no-op MODIFY needed since SL is unchanged from entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1310.46,
      "new_target": 1450.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.2% at 1336.80, big winner. SL 1310.46 sits 1.97% below CMP - good trail-gap. Per Rule (b): unrealized ≥+4%, SL should be at trail level max(entry 1259, last-2% = 1309.86) = 1309.86. Current SL 1310.46 already meets this. Raising target to 1450 reflects stellar Q4 (PAT +134%, EBIT margin 16.6% record) and brokerage TPs Rs 1690-2100. New target only change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.2% at 3062, SL 3025 (=entry, breakeven). SL sits 1.21% below CMP - within trail-gap floor. Strong Q4, defense momentum, but stock had 49% April rally - room for consolidation. Holding breakeven SL gives free option."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 821.88,
      "new_target": 880.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +3.9% at 837.50, SL 821.88 sits 1.86% below CMP - good trail-gap. Q4 record (rev +11%, op margin 46.3%), Nuvama TP 910. Raising target to 880 (52w high 875 + Nuvama trajectory). New target only change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.7% at 1479.80, SL 1445 sits 2.35% below CMP - healthy buffer. Stellar Q4 (PAT +36.6%, UVG 15.3%, EBITDA margin +280bps). Position opened today after the post-results gap-up; some intraday fade normal. Thesis intact, hold to SL or target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.4% at 2434.90, SL 2395 sits 1.64% below CMP - within trail-gap. Earnings call TODAY 16:00 IST is a binary event within hours. Per Rule 11, position is ~7% of capital so below the 5% threshold doesn't apply, but call is intraday - cannot exit/trim cleanly without front-running. Q4 was a STRONG beat (PAT +88%, US +46%, EBITDA margin 33.6%) and stock already gapped +3.26% today. SL 2395 caps downside at -3% from entry. Acceptable risk; hold through call."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 30,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1618.00,
      "stop_loss": 1545.00,
      "target": 1740.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Q4 turnaround: PAT Rs 166cr vs loss YoY, revenue +30%, EBITDA margin 20.3% (vs 10.7%), biotech +100%, EM +124%. Zaynich US FDA approval mid-2026 catalyst. Position size: 30 × 1618 = 48,540 (~4.8% capital). SL 1545 = -4.5% from entry. Risk = 4.8% × 4.5% = 0.22% of portfolio (within 0.5% budget). Target 1740 = +7.5%, R:R 1:1.66. Entry below VWAP 1622 on intraday pullback. Pharma sector defensive in cautious tape - fits market context. No binary event in 3 sessions (Q4 just done). No governance flags. New cluster (Pharma) - LUPIN already held (~5% capital); two-name pharma cluster acceptable."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 0,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 0,
      "stop_loss": 0,
      "target": 0,
      "confidence": 0.4,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "REJECT: Watchlist candidate but no data provided in deep dive. Cannot enter without full data review. NO_ACTION."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1060.65,
      "reasoning": "SL already trailed to 1060.65 (~7.8% locked above entry); target raised to 1130. Letting winner run."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive position, SL 121 with 2.6% buffer. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 4725.56,
      "reasoning": "SL locks +3.3% above entry. May 14 board meeting in 4 sessions - will tighten/exit before then. Target raised to 5050."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NAVINFLUOR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 6960 sits 0.9% below CMP - inside trail-gap but cannot loosen. Hold and accept SL is the calibrated risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TITAGARH",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 836 already very tight. Cannot loosen. Q4 board meeting TBA - monitor closely."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 365 ~0.3% below CMP - calibrated max loss; respect Rule 17, do not pre-empt SL."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven 820, free option remaining. Strong Q4 thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1310.46,
      "reasoning": "Big winner +6.2%. SL 1310.46 already at trail level. Target raised to 1450 on stellar Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Breakeven SL. Defense momentum intact but extended; let it work or stop at breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 821.88,
      "reasoning": "SL locks +2% above entry. Target raised to 880."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Just entered. SL 1445 has 2.35% buffer. Hold."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "LUPIN",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Earnings call today 16:00 IST. SL 2395 caps -3% downside. Strong Q4 already printed and reflected; accept binary residual."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "REJECTED ENTRIES with reasons: (1) PIDILITIND - already held. (2) HAL/CAMS/COFORGE/PNBHOUSING - already held, target raises captured the upside. (3) TATATECH - BEARISH research (Goldman SELL 470, MOSL SELL 500, JM REDUCE 570, FY26 EBIT/PAT declined YoY); volume divergence not enough vs sell-side wall. NO_ACTION. (4) GABRIEL - May 13 board meeting in 3 sessions = binary event window per Rule 11; would need event-trade size + conf ≥0.70; Q3 PAT -9% YoY signals margin pressure. SKIP. (5) FINCABLES/POLYCAB - extended +9% one-day moves at high; chasing breakouts in cautious tape with VIX +3.25% is poor R:R. SKIP. (6) SRF - up +10.71%, extended; specialty chem already covered via NAVINFLUOR + PIDILITIND - 3rd cluster name would breach Rule 10. SKIP. (7) LAURUSLABS/RAMCOCEM/KPIL - momentum names but no compelling differentiation vs WOCKPHARMA on R:R. (8) BHARATFORG - no deep-dive data provided. (9) ABCAPITAL - already held; bullish Q4 thesis already in book. WOCKPHARMA admitted as the one new entry with strongest fundamental catalyst (Q4 turnaround + Zaynich) and acceptable R:R.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployed 58%, cash 42% (₹421K). Adding WOCKPHARMA brings deployment to ~63% - within soft 80% target with room to spare. Per Rule 18, walked through all qualifying BULLISH watchlist candidates with explicit per-name reject rationale rather than freezing admit book. Multiple positions have very tight SLs (NAVINFLUOR 0.9%, ABCAPITAL 0.3%, TITAGARH 0.6%, GRSE/MARICO at breakeven) - these are calibrated max losses placed at entry; will respect them per Rule 17 and not pre-empt. KEY RISK TODAY: HAL board May 14 (4 sessions out - will reduce/tighten next session), Lupin earnings call 16:00 IST (acceptable binary). HFCL stale OPEN order from yesterday should auto-expire EOD or be canceled - flagging but no cancel emitted as it's MIS LIMIT and will be auto-handled. Win rate 15% over 5 days is poor - the trailing-SL discipline this session is meant to convert paper gains to realized."
}
